title: Index AACR Project GENIE (REGISTERED-OPEN) with registration-step documentation
context: AACR Project GENIE is a large pan-cancer registry with open data available through Synapse after a click-through registration (no application, no DUA for the open tier, de-identified aggregate). It is a REGISTERED-OPEN resource and carries license.redistributionAllowed:false (the data redistribution is restricted, but the catalog may independently verify and state descriptive facts about it — index != redistribute). GENIE appears in both Synapse and cBioPortal; per the cross-repository identity rule it is ONE record with two hostingLocations[]. As a REGISTERED-OPEN resource, it requires a mandatory second Access/License/PII sign-off. The registration step must be documented in the record's accessTerms. This is a backlog task that exercises the registered-open tier and badge.
objective: Index AACR Project GENIE as a single REGISTERED-OPEN canonical record with both Synapse and cBioPortal as hostingLocations[], redistributionAllowed:false cited and correctly handled by the CI linter, mandatory second Access/License/PII sign-off, and the registration step documented in accessTerms.
acceptanceCriteria: A single canonical record for AACR Project GENIE is authored with accessTier:REGISTERED-OPEN and accessTerms.registrationRequired:true, accessTerms.clickThrough:true, accessTerms.duaRequired:false.

hostingLocations[] lists both Synapse and cBioPortal as hosting locations with isMirror noted appropriately; identityKeys are set (primaryCustodian:AACR, programOrAccession: the GENIE identifier, generationScope).
license.redistributionAllowed is set to false with a cited clause; the record is nonetheless indexed because index != redistribute; the CI linter (ci-linter-014) does not reject it on this basis.
The registration step is documented in the record (which portal to register at, what is required) as a descriptive fact with fieldProvenance.
Mandatory second Access/License/PII sign-off recorded in the gate artifact (gates/genie.json) as required for REGISTERED-OPEN resources.
Every field has a fieldProvenance citation; completeness score ≥ 90/100; gate artifact committed; CI green; outputLicense CC-BY-4.0; DCO signed-off.
output: A committed catalog record (catalog/genie.json) for AACR Project GENIE as a REGISTERED-OPEN entry with gate artifact and registration-step documentation, proving the registered-open tier and redistributionAllowed:false handling are correct.
